seoTitle: How to Make a Title Page on Google Docs (2026 Guide)
metaDescription: Build a striking title page in Google Docs with custom background styling, title typography, and a section break to keep it separate from the body.
intro: A well-designed title page gives a thesis, proposal, or manuscript a professional first impression. This guide covers isolating a dedicated title space, styling your typography hierarchy, and locking the page's layout with a section break so it stays visually separate from your document body.

steps.heading: Isolate a blank title space
steps.body: Place your cursor at the very start of the document to establish a dedicated area for your title layer.

steps.heading: Adjust background and margins
steps.body: Use Page Setup to configure custom background canvas colors and margin spacing for the title page.

steps.heading: Build alignment containers
steps.body: Insert tables or shapes to act as containment frames that keep your title metadata neatly aligned.

steps.heading: Style your title typography
steps.body: Apply dramatic font sizes, weighted subtitles, and custom line-height to give the title visual hierarchy and presence.

steps.heading: Hide headers and page numbers
steps.body: Activate Different first page so automated running headers, footers, and page numbers don't appear on your cover layout.

steps.heading: Lock the layout with a section break
steps.body: Insert a Section Break (Next Page) to permanently freeze the title page's formatting and separate it from the rest of the document.

faq.question: How is a title page different from a cover page?
faq.answer: The terms are often used interchangeably, and both refer to the same front-matter page that introduces a document before the main text.

faq.question: Can I add an image behind my title text?
faq.answer: Yes, insert an image and set its wrap setting to behind text so it acts as a background layer for your title elements.

faq.question: Why won't my page number hide on the title page?
faq.answer: Make sure Different first page is enabled in your header and footer settings; without it, numbering will still appear on every page.

faq.question: Does the section break affect margins in the rest of the document?
faq.answer: No, a section break lets your title page maintain its own formatting independently, without changing margins or headers elsewhere in the file.
